mapper.sql: id, demand_plan_id, material_code, material_desc, material_unit, logical_plant_no, logical_plant_name, status, deleted, create_time, creator_id, update_time, updator_id, tenant_id
mapper.select: select plm.id as plm_id, plm.material_code, plm.material_desc, plm.material_unit, plm.logical_plant_no, plm_p.id as period_id, plm_p.plan_period, plm_p.plan_amount, plm_p.ext_info from pl_demand_plan_material plm left join pl_demand_plan_material_period plm_p on plm.id = plm_p.demand_plan_material_id where plm.deleted = 0 and plm_p.deleted = 0 and plm.status != 2 and plm_p.status != 2 and plm.tenant_id = #{tenantId} and plm.demand_plan_id = #{demandPlanId} ORDER BY plan_period
mapper.insert: insert into `pl_demand_plan_material` (id, demand_plan_id, material_code, material_desc, material_unit, logical_plant_no, logical_plant_name, status, deleted, create_time, creator_id, update_time, updator_id, tenant_id) values (#{id}, #{demandPlanId}, #{materialCode}, #{materialDesc}, #{materialUnit}, #{logicalPlantNo}, #{logicalPlantName}, #{status}, #{isDelete}, #{createTime}, #{createUserId}, #{updateTime}, #{updateUserId}, #{tenantId})

insert into `pl_demand_plan_material`
id,
demand_plan_id,
material_code,
material_desc,
material_unit,
logical_plant_no,
logical_plant_name,
status,
deleted,
create_time,
creator_id,
update_time,
updator_id,
tenant_id,
#{id},
#{demandPlanId},
#{materialCode},
#{materialDesc},
#{materialUnit},
#{logicalPlantNo},
#{logicalPlantName},
#{status},
#{isDelete},
#{createTime},
#{createUserId},
#{updateTime},
#{updateUserId},
#{tenantId},
mapper.update:
update `pl_demand_plan_material`
demand_plan_id = #{demandPlanId},
material_code = #{materialCode},
material_desc = #{materialDesc},
material_unit = #{materialUnit},
logical_plant_no = #{logicalPlantNo},
logical_plant_name = #{logicalPlantName},
status = #{status},
deleted = #{isDelete},
updator_id = #{updateUserId},
where id = #{id}

update `pl_demand_plan_material` set demand_plan_id = #{demandPlanId}, material_code = #{materialCode}, material_desc = #{materialDesc}, material_unit = #{materialUnit}, logical_plant_no = #{logicalPlantNo}, logical_plant_name = #{logicalPlantName}, status = #{status}, deleted = #{isDelete}, updator_id = #{updateUserId} where id = #{id}
mapper.select:
select
from `pl_demand_plan_material` where demand_plan_id = #{id} and deleted=0 and status=1
mapper.update:
update`pl_demand_plan_material` set deleted = 1 where demand_plan_id = #{demandPlanId} and deleted = 0 and material_code in
#{materialCode}
